menzaApp.name: Menza App - Walking Tracking Mobile App
menzaApp.description: Real-time location tracking and dynamic route visualization for activity monitoring on iOS and Android. Built with React Native, Expo, Expo Maps, Supabase, and Zustand for cloud-based data management and state handling.

reactChatApp.name: Real-Time Chat Application
reactChatApp.description: Low-latency, real-time messaging with secure JWT-based authentication and a responsive UI. Built with React, Socket.IO, Express, MongoDB, and Tailwind CSS for WebSocket-based instant communication.

airCompanion.name: Airport Companion Mobile App
airCompanion.description: Indoor navigation system using shortest-path algorithms and a YOLOv5-powered AI chatbot for flight status and gate info. Built with React Native, Redux, Firebase, and JavaScript.
